initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
  AND d.district_id = (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
    ORDER BY A3 DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  );

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
  AND d.district_id = (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
    ORDER BY A3 DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  );

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
  AND d.district_id = (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
    ORDER BY A3 DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  );

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_male
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
  AND d.district_id = (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
    ORDER BY A3 DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  );

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
  AND d.district_id = (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia'
    ORDER BY A3 DESC
    LIMIT 1
  );
